nasb.text: And the city has no need of the sun or of the moon to shine on it, for the glory of God has illumined it, and its lamp is the Lamb.

esv.text: And the city has no need of sun or moon to shine on it, for the glory of God gives it light, and its lamp is the Lamb.

cnv.text: 這城不需要日月照明，因為有　神的榮耀照明，而羊羔就是城的燈。

ccb.text: 圣城里不需要太阳和月亮的光照耀，因为有上帝的荣光照耀，羔羊就是圣城的灯。

csbs.text: 这城不需要太阳和月亮来照耀，因为神的荣耀照亮她，而羔羊就是她的灯。
